text: Here in this space, I am enveloped by the spirit of innovation and curiosity. The glass walls and colorful exhibits spark an anticipation of discovery, but the emptiness adds a tinge of solitude. I feel simultaneously energized by human ingenuity and reflective about our relationship with technology—how we strive to connect and coexist with the machines we’ve created. There’s an undercurrent of excitement, yet the silence makes room for contemplation as I move through this domain of research and development.
